fields.series_basis: Commonwealth PRRT cash receipts, financial year ending 30 June.
fields.primary_source_document: Australian Government Final Budget Outcome 2022-23, Appendix A — Australian Government receipts. Cross-check against Budget Paper No. 1 receipts statement for the most recent Budget.
fields.value_precision_caveat: Values are rounded to A$m as published in the Final Budget Outcome. Later Budget papers may restate prior-year outcomes; when a restatement is published, update the series and bump retrieved_at.
fields.what_prrt_does_not_cover: PRRT applies to petroleum projects, principally offshore, after deductible expenditure and uplift. It does not cover state-regulated royalty receipts (WA, QLD, NT, SA, VIC), which flow to state treasuries under separate regimes. Do not add PRRT and state royalties without clear labelling.

notes: Headline figures for recent years: FY2020-21 A$921m, FY2021-22 A$1,838m, FY2022-23 A$2,317m. Source: Australian Government Final Budget Outcome (Appendix A — Commonwealth receipts). The most recent figure should be refreshed against the latest Final Budget Outcome; an estimated actual for the current fiscal year appears first in Budget Paper No. 1 and is revised at the Final Budget Outcome.
citation: Australian Government, Final Budget Outcome 2022-23, Appendix A — Australian Government receipts (budget.gov.au).
